notes: Spec downloaded from official neynarxyz/OAS repo (no public well-known URL — api.neynar.com/v2/openapi.json requires auth, docs.neynar.com/openapi.json 404s).

Preprocessed before progenitor: (1) removed all error responses and any non-body success response from each operation so each op has at most one response with content (progenitor 0.14 panics otherwise on assertion response_types.len() <= 1); (2) renamed components NotificationType -> NotificationTypeFilter, NotificationCampaignStatus -> NotificationCampaignStatusEnum, SubscribedToObject -> SubscribedToObjectInfo to avoid clashing with same-named inline-generated enums.
ext/Cargo.toml feature `neynar` had to be extended with `dep:uuid` and `dep:regress` (used by generated types). Workspace deps for uuid and regress were added.
gen-tool skipped 24 endpoints with enum-typed query params (channels, feeds, etc) — not strictly an issue since we curate the surface anyway.

Auth: Neynar uses an `x-api-key` header declared via securitySchemes; progenitor doesn't auto-add it. The curated tool layer wraps reqwest::Client with a default x-api-key header before constructing NeynarClient.
